headline: Simon Property Group Announces Offering of Euro-Denominated Notes
summary: Simon Property Group, L.P., a global leader in the ownership of premier shopping, dining, entertainment and mixed-use destinations (the "Company"), today announced that its indirect subsidiary, Simon Global Development B.V., incorporated as a private limited liability company (besloten vennootschap met beperkte aansprakelijkheid) registered with the Dutch Trade Register of the Chamber of Commerce (the "Issuer"), has agreed to sell €500,000,000 principal amount of its 3.650% unsecured notes due 2

raw.headline: Simon Property Group Announces Offering of Euro-Denominated Notes
raw.summary: Simon Property Group, L.P., a global leader in the ownership of premier shopping, dining, entertainment and mixed-use destinations (the "Company"), today announced that its indirect subsidiary, Simon Global Development B.V., incorporated as a private limited liability company (besloten vennootschap met beperkte aansprakelijkheid) registered with the Dutch Trade Register of the Chamber of Commerce (the "Issuer"), has agreed to sell €500,000,000 principal amount of its 3.650% unsecured notes due 2
